name: Stevie Wonder
description: American and Ghanaian singer-songwriter, composer and record producer (born 1950)
abstract: Stevland Hardaway Morris (  STEEV-lənd; né Judkins; born May 13, 1950), known professionally as Stevie Wonder, is an American singer-songwriter, musician, and record producer. He is widely regarded as one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century, and is credited as a pioneer and influence by musicians across a range of genre…

Pop and Rock Legends: Stevie Wonder

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Monheit
about_quotes.evidence: I have not just listened to jazz in my life. So much other music. You know in the car we’re more likely to be listening to like Zeppelin, or Jimi Hendrix, or The Beatles or Stevie Wonder or something like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jane Monheit interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 20, 2010

about_quotes.speaker: David Finck
about_quotes.evidence: They don’t know what makes a Stevie Wonder song a great song... I could put on an Earth, Wind & Fire record... And that means something.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Finck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 29, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Vi Redd
about_quotes.evidence: on Sunday I listen to Stevie Wonder’s station, KGLH because they play a whole Gospel thing on Sunday.
about_quotes.doc_title: Vi Redd interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 13, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Arthur Baron
about_quotes.evidence: I’m very lucky, I played with Stevie Wonder, Duke Ellington, B.B. King
about_quotes.doc_title: Arthur Baron interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 3, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.evidence: I had played with Stevie a couple of times when he was in town and he’d hire horn section... I didn’t make all the gigs... Kenny’s mother wouldn’t let him go on the road... We went to South America and Europe

about_quotes.speaker: Lionel Hampton
about_quotes.evidence: I think that they were probably really happy to make a record with you. ... Yes. I’ll tell you, it was quite an ordeal having these great stars to work with me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lionel Hampton interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, October 18, 1995
